The '''''Goldhawk''''' was a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] in service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It served in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]] during the Rebellion's operations there.

Assigned to the new-built starship component factory ''[[Soren]]'', ''Goldhawk'' participated in the [[Attack on Soren|Imperial attack there]]. With ''Soren'' losing shield strength, it sought to escape with select personnel aboard. Unfortunately for its crew and passengers, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] starfighters shot it down.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
